'''gawowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaknoite|swaknoite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaknoite|swaknoite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gawowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæweweth|gæweweth]] || [[word:gæwewej|gæwewej]] || [[word:gæwewesh|gæwewesh]] || [[word:gæwewe|gæwewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawowowoth|gawowowoth]] || [[word:gawowowoj|gawowowoj]] || [[word:gawowowosh|gawowowosh]] || [[word:gawowowo|gawowowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawowoth|gawowoth]] || [[word:gawowoj|gawowoj]] || [[word:gawowosh|gawowosh]] || [[word:gawowo|gawowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawofwoth|gawofwoth]] || [[word:gawofwoj|gawofwoj]] || [[word:gawofwosh|gawofwosh]] || [[word:gawofwof|gawofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gawowotho|gawowotho]] || [[word:gawowojo|gawowojo]] || [[word:gawowosho|gawowosho]] || [[word:gawowoko|gawowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gawowoth|gawowoth]] || [[word:gawowoj|gawowoj]] || [[word:gawowosh|gawowosh]] || [[word:gawowo|gawowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gawowothol|gawowothol]] || [[word:gawowojol|gawowojol]] || [[word:gawowoshol|gawowoshol]] || [[word:gawowokol|gawowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gawowothotho|gawowothotho]] || [[word:gawowojojo|gawowojojo]] || [[word:gawowoshosho|gawowoshosho]] || [[word:gawowoko|gawowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gawowothon|gawowothon]] || [[word:gawowojon|gawowojon]] || [[word:gawowoshon|gawowoshon]] || [[word:gawowokon|gawowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gawowothoro|gawowothoro]] || [[word:gawowojoro|gawowojoro]] || [[word:gawowoshoro|gawowoshoro]] || [[word:gawowokoro|gawowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
